blocks.title: Analgesic Veil
blocks.textualdata:
name: 'Analgesic Veil'
spell_level: 4-level
casting_time: '1 action'
range: '15'' radius around caster'
components: 'V, S, M'
materials: 'A clear mirror worth at least 200 gp'
duration: '1 minute'
school: Conjuration
attack: ''
effect: 'Temporary HP gain'
higher_levels: "When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, add one additional hit die to the roll for each slot level above 4th.\r\n"
classes: Physician
spell_description: 'An aurora of warding energy pours out from you, suffusing a 15 ft. radius area around you. You and all allied creatures within that area roll three of their hit dice and gain that amount in temporary hit points. These hit points last until they are lost, or until one minute passes. These hit dice are only used for calculation and are not spent. Creatures affected by the spell become covered in a shimmering layer of magical energy that represents this spell.'
source: 'Physician Class (DM Guild)'
tags: spell
templateId: '3000'
blockId: '1243580'
world: 787ab6f0-98d7-4f1e-9823-5c4b0be6f48e
folder: 2afa5f80-a37b-11f0-b3cc-1224bc67b5c8

blocks.title: Bolster
blocks.textualdata:
name: Bolster
spell_level: '0-level (Cantrip)'
casting_time: ''
range: Touch
components: 'V, S'
materials: ''
duration: Instantaneous
school: Evocation
attack: ''
effect: Healing
higher_levels: 'This spell''s extra healing increases by 1d4 when you reach 5th level (2d4), 11th level (3d4), and 17th level (4d4).'
classes: Physician
spell_description: 'You reach out and speed up a creature''s natural healing. If the target has at least 1 hitpoint, [i]it can spend a hit die[/i] and regain that many hit points, along with [i]an additional 1d4 hit points[/i]. If the creature has no hit dice remaining, this spell has no effect.'
source: 'Physician Class (DM Guild)'
tags: ''
templateId: '3000'
blockId: '1243575'
world: 787ab6f0-98d7-4f1e-9823-5c4b0be6f48e
folder: '21506'
